title: pavonia narcissi
intro: Pavonia narcissi, also known as rose mallow or pink mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as a laxative. Its health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of pavonia narcissi typically involve boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a tea, or using the plant in tincture form to treat various ailments.
